retrieval_meta.question: List the names of ipilimumab trials for melanoma where the overall follow-up duration was greater than 21 months?

meta.retrieval_contract: expects per-decomposed top-k in retrieval_by_decomposition when available

results.input_question: List the names of ipilimumab trials for melanoma where the overall follow-up duration was greater than 21 months?

decomposed_queries: List the names of ipilimumab trials for melanoma where the overall follow-up duration was greater than 21 months?

retrieval_trace.decomposed_query: List the names of ipilimumab trials for melanoma where the overall follow-up duration was greater than 21 months?

retrieval_by_decomposition.decomposed_query: List the names of ipilimumab trials for melanoma where the overall follow-up duration was greater than 21 months?

candidate.question: From ipilimumab melanoma trials, which have an overall follow-up duration greater than 21 months, list the Name of ICI and overall follow-up duration?
candidate.sql: SELECT "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;
candidate.parent_question: List the names of ipilimumab trials for melanoma where the overall follow-up duration was greater than 21 months?

candidate.question: What Melanoma trials involve Ipilimumab?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab';
candidate.parent_question: Find Phase 3 Ipilimumab trials in Melanoma that were follow-up publications?

candidate.question: What are the Name of ICI and overall follow-up duration for trials where Cancer type is Melanoma and Name of ICI is Ipilimumab?
candidate.sql: SELECT "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab';
